clusters.title: Keir Starmer resignation as it happened: British PM resigns, Andy Burnham declares intention to run as successor
clusters.neutral_headline: UK's Keir Starmer heeds calls to step down as PM
bullet_summary: Reported by The Age, Canberra Times, ABC News Australia and others

items.title: Keir Starmer resignation as it happened: British PM resigns, Andy Burnham declares intention to run as successor
items.standfirst: Keir Starmer has resigned as leader of the British Labour Party, paving the way for Andy Burnham to become prime minister.
items.content: Keir Starmer has resigned as leader of the British Labour Party, paving the way for Andy Burnham to become prime minister.

items.title: British PM resigns
items.standfirst: UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer has fought back emotion in a dramatic announcement in front of the world's media outside 10 Downing Street.
items.content: UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer has fought back emotion in a dramatic announcement in front of the world's media outside 10 Downing Street.

items.title: UK's Keir Starmer heeds calls to step down as PM
items.standfirst: UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer has bowed to mounting pressure, announcing his resignation and clearing the way for leadership rival Andy Burnham to take power.
items.content: UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer has bowed to mounting pressure, announcing his resignation and clearing the way for leadership rival Andy Burnham to take power.

items.title: Starmer resigns as PM with Andy Burnham poised to get top job
items.standfirst: Sir Keir Starmer will resign as prime minister of the UK, succumbing to intense pressure within his own Labour party less than two years after winning one of its biggest ever election victories.
items.content: Sir Keir Starmer will resign as prime minister of the UK, succumbing to intense pressure within his own Labour party less than two years after winning one of its biggest ever election victories.

items.title: Emotional Starmer says he will quit as British PM — as it happened
items.standfirst: British Prime Minister Sir Keir Starmer says he has quit as leader of the Labour party and will stay on as PM until a new leader is chosen next month.
items.content: British Prime Minister Sir Keir Starmer says he has quit as leader of the Labour party and will stay on as PM until a new leader is chosen next month.

clusters.title: What we know about how H5N1 bird flu got here and where it may appear next
clusters.neutral_headline: What we know about how H5N1 bird flu got here and where it may appear next
bullet_summary: Now infected birds have been found in Western Australia

items.title: What we know about how H5N1 bird flu got here and where it may appear next
items.standfirst: Authorities were worried about avian influenza coming in from the north, until the virus started moving across the Southern Ocean. Now infected birds have been found in Western Australia. Where else could birds carrying the virus land?
items.content: Authorities were worried about avian influenza coming in from the north, until the virus started moving across the Southern Ocean. Now infected birds have been found in Western Australia. Where else could birds carrying the virus land?
